zh.lifeSummary: 當Lord Conan de Fiennes於大約1080年出生在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯時，他的父親Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )25歲，母親Adelle Furnes22歲。他於1100年之前與Alix de Bournonville在艾歐洛結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1133年7月16日在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德維其雷斯享年54歲，埋葬在法國諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lord Conan de Fiennes于大约1080年出生在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯时，他的父亲Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )25岁，母亲Adelle Furnes22岁。他于1100年之前与Alix de Bournonville在艾歐洛结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。他去世于1133年7月16日在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯諾爾德維其雷斯享年54岁，埋葬在法国諾爾-帕-德-卡拉斯帕-德-卡拉斯範恩斯。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Fiennes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Finnis
meanings: Norman, English, Irish: locative name from Fiennes (Pas-de-Calais).  See also  Filtness  .

nameMeanings.name: Conan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Anglicized spelling of Conán . In historical times, the name was borne by a 7th-century saint, bishop of the Isle of Man.  Sir Arthur Conan Doyle  (  1859–1930 ), creator of  Sherlock Holmes , was born in Edinburgh, of Irish stock. The science-fiction creation Conan the Destroyer owes more to the villain of legend than to the bishop or the writer. For the most part this name is of Irish origin; however, it was in use in Yorkshire, especially among the Askes and the Bartons, from the 12th to the 16th centuries. In this case, the name was derived from Conan, Earl of Richmond, and is of Breton origin.

en.lifeSummary: When Lord Conan de Fiennes was born about 1080, in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, his father, Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ), was 25 and his mother, Adelle Furnes, was 22. He married Alix de Bournonville before 1100, in Europe. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died on 16 July 1133, in Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, at the age of 54, and was buried in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lord Conan de Fiennes est né environ 1080, à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, son père, Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ), avait 25 ans et sa mère, Adelle Furnes, avait 22 ans. Il a épousé Alix de Bournonville avant 1100, à Europe. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils. Il est décédé le 16 juillet 1133, à Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France, à l’âge de 54 ans, et a été enterré à Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Lord Conan de Fiennes um 1080 in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ) 25 und seine Mutter Adelle Furnes 22. Er hat vor 1100 in Europa Alix de Bournonville geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne. Er starb am 16. Juli 1133 im Alter von 54 Jahren in Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich und wurde in Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Conan de Fiennes è nato il circa 1080 nel Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, il suo padre, Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ), aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Adelle Furnes, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Alix de Bournonville prima del 1100, nel Europa. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli. Morì il 16 luglio 1133, nel Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, all'età di 54 anni, e fu sepolto a Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Lord Conan de Fiennesが約1080年にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスで生まれた時，父Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )は25歳，母Adelle Furnesは22歳であった。1100年以前にヨーロッパでAlix de Bournonvilleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。彼は1133年7月16日にフランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスノードウィクレスで54歳で死去し，フランスノード-プアス-デ-カレイスプアス-デ-カレイスフィーンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Lord Conan de Fiennes(이)가 대략 1080년 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral )(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelle Furnes(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1100년 이전 우럽에서 Alix de Bournonville(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1133년 7월 16일 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 노르드 위크레스에서 54세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 노르드-파스-데-캘레이 파스-데-캘레이 피네스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lord Conan de Fiennes nasceu aproximadamente 1080, em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, seu pai, Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ), tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Adelle Furnes, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Alix de Bournonville antes 1100, em Europa. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos. Ele faleceu em 16 de julho de 1133, em Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França, com 54 anos, e foi sepultado em Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lord Conan de Fiennes родился около 1080 г. в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция, его отцу по имени Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ) было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelle Furnes, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Alix de Bournonville перед 1100 г. в местности Европа. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына. Он умер 16 июля 1133 г. в местности викресь, норд, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция в возрасте 54 лет и был похоронен в местности фиеннесь, пас-де-калеи, норд-пас-де-калеи, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lord Conan de Fiennes nació aproximadamente 1080, en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, su papá, Eustache De Fiennes ( Admiral ), tenía 25 años y su mamá, Adelle Furnes, tenía 22 años. Se casó con Alix de Bournonville antes de 1100, en Europa. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos. Murió el 16 de julio de 1133, en Wicres, Nord, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia, a la edad de 54 años, y fue sepultado en Fiennes, Pas-de-Calais, Nord-Pas-de-Calais, Francia.
